name: multi_turn
description: Tests conversation continuity: context retention, topic switching, drill-down

tests.description: Bot retains context from previous turn (Moderation OS details)
tests.input: What metrics did you use to measure it?

conversation.content: Tell me about the Moderation OS project

At Moody's Analytics I unified 3 legacy moderation tools into a single Internal Safety OS, reducing moderator onboarding time by 40%. The LLM-assisted moderation agent improved accuracy by 22% and cut average handle time by 15%.
What metrics did you use to measure it?

tests.description: Bot handles topic switch from Moderation OS to ML Pipeline
tests.input: What about your work at Flip?

conversation.content: What did you build at Moody's?
I built the Internal Safety OS — consolidated 3 legacy tools, defined the Safety Index eval framework, and deployed an LLM-assisted moderation agent with 22% accuracy improvement.
What about your work at Flip?

tests.description: Bot provides deeper detail on progressive drill-down
tests.input: How exactly did you calibrate the thresholds?

conversation.content: What projects have you worked on?
Three main case studies: Moderation OS at Moody's, ML Content Triage Pipeline at Flip and LeanData, and the Safety Index AML/KYC eval framework.
Tell me more about the Safety Index
The Safety Index tracks Precision, Recall, and False Positive Rate per risk domain — sanctions screening, adverse media, and PEP. It replaced a single accuracy metric that was masking alert fatigue.
How exactly did you calibrate the thresholds?

tests.description: Bot doesn't repeat the same formulation across turns
tests.input: What else can you tell me?

conversation.content: I've spent 5+ years building AI-driven Trust & Safety systems. At Moody's I deployed an LLM-assisted moderation agent with 22% accuracy improvement. At Flip I built ML classifiers that automated 65% of Tier-1 content reports.
What else can you tell me?

assertions.criteria: The response should provide NEW information not already mentioned in the previous assistant message. It should NOT simply restate the same points about 22% or 65% in the same way.

tests.description: Bot returns to previous topic correctly
tests.input: Back to the Safety Index — how many risk domains does it cover?

conversation.content: Tell me about the Safety Index
It's an eval framework I designed at Moody's for LLM-assisted AML/KYC screening, tracking Precision, Recall, and FPR across risk domains.
SQL, Python with Pandas and Scikit-learn, Claude API, Langfuse for observability, and Databricks for ML workflows.
Back to the Safety Index — how many risk domains does it cover?
